workflow_instructions.mode_overview: The Documentation Platform mode enables creation and maintenance of professional-grade documentation systems similar to Appwrite Docs, Tailwind CSS Docs, or Stripe Docs. It provides comprehensive guidance for building documentation platforms with AI-powered search, responsive layouts, and intelligent navigation.

step.details: Identify the documentation goals: - Target audience and their needs - Documentation structure and hierarchy - Content types (tutorials, API references, guides) - Platform requirements (hosting, deployment, integrations)

step.action: Gather existing documentation and codebase context
step.details: Review the minimal set of materials needed: - Existing documentation files (markdown, MDX) - UI component library for documentation components - Design system tokens and theme configuration - Navigation structure and content relationships
Determine Minimax API integration needs: - API availability and configuration - Search indexing requirements - Natural language query handling - Semantic search capabilities

steps.step: Define navigation hierarchy and category structure
Plan sidebar layout with collapsible sections
Design content area with proper typography scale
Define right-side contextual panel components
Plan top navigation with breadcrumbs and version selector
Build sidebar navigation with collapsible tree structure
Implement main content area with markdown rendering
Create right-side panel with TOC, related topics, code refs
Add top navigation bar with breadcrumbs and theme toggle
Implement previous/next topic navigation
Set up Minimax API client and configuration
Implement search indexing pipeline
Build natural language query parser
Create semantic search with context awareness
Add search suggestions, history, and filters
Implement collapsible mobile sidebar
Add smooth page transitions
Configure theme persistence (dark/light)
Add keyboard shortcuts for navigation
Implement syntax highlighting for code blocks

completion_criteria.criterion: Sidebar navigation with collapsible sections and hierarchical categories
Main content area with proper typography and markdown rendering
Right-side contextual panel with TOC, related topics, and code references
Top navigation with breadcrumbs, version selector, and theme toggle
Previous/next topic navigation at bottom of each page
AI-powered search with natural language query support
Search suggestions, keyboard shortcuts, and filtering options
Responsive design with mobile-friendly collapsible sidebars
Dark/light theme support with persistent user preferences
Syntax highlighting and interactive code playgrounds
